entry.title: THE BMW M5 | BMW | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

A high-performance BMW M5 artwork created for those who appreciate the perfect balance of luxury and power.

This cinematic split poster showcases the legendary M5 in a dramatic performance-focused setting, highlighting its aggressive styling, muscular stance, and unmistakable M heritage. Combining executive luxury with track-inspired engineering, the artwork delivers a striking blend of speed, sophistication, and modern automotive excellence.

Product Details:

Printed on 300 GSM premium matte sheet

Ultra-detailed BMW M5 artwork

Performance-inspired visual theme

Cinematic split panel composition

Frame not included

Perfect For:

BMW enthusiasts

Performance sedan collectors

Automotive wall decor

Gaming and workstation setups

Luxury car lovers

About the Car:

The BMW M5 is one of the most iconic high-performance sedans ever created. Powered by a formidable twin-turbocharged V8 engine and engineered by BMW's renowned M Division, the M5 combines supercar-level performance with everyday practicality. Known for its breathtaking acceleration, advanced all-wheel-drive system, and refined driving dynamics, the M5 continues to set the benchmark for performance luxury sedans around the world.

Note: Slight color variation may occur due to lighting and screen differences.

entry.title: NISSAN SKYLINE R34 | SKYLINE | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

A legendary Nissan Skyline GT-R R34 artwork created for true JDM enthusiasts and automotive purists.

This cinematic split poster showcases the iconic R34 in a dramatic studio-inspired setting, highlighting its aggressive stance, signature Bayside Blue finish, and timeless performance heritage. Combining Japanese engineering excellence with modern automotive aesthetics, the artwork delivers a powerful blend of speed, precision, and street-racing culture.

Product Details:

Printed on 300 GSM premium matte sheet

Ultra-detailed Nissan Skyline GT-R R34 artwork

Iconic Bayside Blue performance theme

Cinematic split panel composition

Frame not included

Perfect For:

Nissan Skyline enthusiasts

JDM collectors

Automotive wall decor

Gaming and workstation setups

Car culture lovers

About the Car:

The Nissan Skyline GT-R R34 is one of the most celebrated Japanese performance cars ever built. Powered by the legendary 2.6L twin-turbo RB26DETT engine and equipped with the advanced ATTESA E-TS Pro all-wheel-drive system, the R34 earned its reputation through exceptional performance, motorsport success, and a lasting influence on global car culture. Its unmistakable design and engineering excellence continue to make it a dream car for enthusiasts worldwide.

Note: Slight color variation may occur due to lighting and screen differences.

entry.title: Let The Storm Begin | Formula 1 | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

A powerful tribute to Max Verstappen's relentless speed, aggression, and championship-winning mindset.

This dynamic Formula 1 artwork showcases Verstappen's Red Bull Racing machine emerging through stormy skies, capturing the intensity, precision, and dominance that have defined a new era of motorsport. The bold vertical composition, dramatic atmosphere, and modern typography create a striking centerpiece for any racing enthusiast's collection.


Product Details:

  • Printed on 300 GSM premium matte sheet
  • High-resolution Formula 1 artwork
  • Red Bull Racing inspired design
  • Premium vertical poster layout
  • Frame not included

Perfect For:

  • Formula 1 fans
  • Max Verstappen supporters
  • Motorsport enthusiasts
  • Gaming and workstation setups
  • Racing-themed room decor

About Max Verstappen:

Max Verstappen is one of Formula 1's most dominant drivers, known for his fearless overtaking, exceptional racecraft, and multiple World Championship victories. Driving for Red Bull Racing, he has redefined modern Formula 1 with his aggressive style, consistency, and ability to perform under pressure, becoming one of the sport's most influential competitors.


Note: Slight color variation may occur due to lighting and screen differences.

entry.title: Michael Schumacher | The Red Legend | Formula 1 | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

A tribute to one of the greatest Formula 1 drivers in history — Michael Schumacher.

This striking motorsport artwork captures Schumacher during his iconic Ferrari era, celebrating the passion, precision, and dominance that defined an entire generation of Formula 1 racing. Featuring bold typography, championship-winning Ferrari imagery, and a clean editorial-style composition, this poster honors the legacy of a true racing legend.


Product Details:

  • Printed on 300 GSM premium matte sheet
  • High-resolution Formula 1 artwork
  • Ferrari-inspired racing aesthetics
  • Modern editorial poster design
  • Frame not included

Perfect For:

  • Formula 1 fans
  • Ferrari enthusiasts
  • Motorsport collectors
  • Gaming and workstation setups
  • Racing-themed wall decor

About Michael Schumacher:

Michael Schumacher is regarded as one of the most successful Formula 1 drivers of all time. With seven World Championship titles and an era-defining partnership with Ferrari, he transformed the sport through relentless dedication, exceptional racecraft, and unmatched consistency. His influence continues to inspire generations of drivers and motorsport fans worldwide.


Note: Slight color variation may occur due to lighting and screen differences.

About the Car:

The Lamborghini Huracán Sterrato transforms the traditional supercar formula by combining a naturally aspirated 5.2L V10 engine with rally-inspired capability. Designed to tackle dirt, gravel, and rough terrain while delivering thrilling performance, it stands as one of Lamborghini's most adventurous and unique creations.

entry.title: Mercedes Benz 190E W201 | Classic Benz Street Art Set | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

The Mercedes-Benz 190E (W201) is a symbol of timeless engineering and unmistakable German luxury. Known for its precision handling, iconic boxy design, and legendary reliability, the 190E became one of the most respected compact performance sedans of its era.

This artwork captures the classic Benz attitude with a bold graffiti-style design set against a dramatic gothic mansion backdrop. The cinematic lighting, misty driveway reflections, and street-art typography create a powerful blend of luxury and street culture, making it the perfect centerpiece for any automotive enthusiast’s space.

Ideal for gaming rooms, car lovers, street-style interiors, and modern setups, this poster celebrates the legacy of one of Mercedes-Benz’s most iconic sedans.

Designed with a cinematic composition and elegant typography, this poster is perfect for luxury car enthusiasts, modern interiors, gaming setups, offices, and premium room décor.

✔ Premium high-definition artwork
✔ Perfect for luxury and automotive themed rooms
✔ Ideal gift for Rolls-Royce and exotic car lovers
✔ Elegant design that enhances any wall space

Bring the spirit of luxury, prestige, and timeless design to your wall with this Rolls-Royce Phantom poster.

entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

RISE

This is more than just a poster.
It’s a reminder.

Set against a powerful sunset horizon, this cinematic warrior silhouette captures the moment between boyhood and strength — between doubt and destiny.

“This is no place for a boy. You must be a warrior.”

Perfect for those who believe in growth, discipline, and rising above challenges. Whether you're building your mindset, your career, or your body — this artwork symbolizes transformation.

Minimal. Powerful. Relatable.

Ideal for:
• Bedroom walls
• Gym spaces
• Study rooms
• Gaming setups
• Motivational corners

Printed on premium high-quality paper with sharp detailing and rich cinematic tones.

Rise above. Every single day.

entry.title: Customize Your Wall 4 Piece Split Art Set (2×2 Grid)
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 449.00 - 549.00 (3 variants)

🖼️ 4-Piece Custom Poster Set (2×2 Split) – Made Just for You

Turn your favorite memories, ideas, or inspirations into a stunning 4-piece wall art set. This custom split combo is designed to transform any space with a clean, balanced, and premium look—perfect for bedrooms, living rooms, gaming setups, offices, or gifting.

Upload your own photo, artwork, quote, or design and we’ll professionally print it as a matching 2×2 split poster set (4 panels) that looks cohesive and eye-catching on your wall.

✨ Why You’ll Love It

  • Fully customizable – upload your own image or design
  • Printed as a 4-piece coordinated 2×2 set for a clean gallery-style finish
  • High-quality print with rich colors and sharp details
  • Lightweight, easy to paste, and wall-friendly
  • Ideal for personal décor, gifts, couple photos, memory walls, brand walls

📐 Product Details

  • Set includes 4 individual posters (2×2 split layout)
  • Printed on 300 GSM matte premium paper
  • Fade-resistant, high-resolution printing
  • Perfect for bedrooms, halls, hostels, studios & offices

Note: Minor size/crop variations may occur based on the uploaded image ratio to ensure the best visual output. We may adjust cropping slightly to avoid cutting faces or key subjects.

🎁 Perfect For

  • Personal photos & memories
  • Couple / friendship posters
  • Motivation & quote walls
  • Gaming / anime / movie themes
  • Birthday & special occasion gifts

Create a wall that truly feels yours.

entry.title: Himalayan Serenity Machhapuchhre | Artistic Painting Effect | 3 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Bring the silence of the Himalayas into your space with this Machhapuchhre (Fishtail Peak) 3-Panel Split Wall Art, inspired by the sacred mountains of the Annapurna range.

Featuring soft dreamy blue skies, gentle golden sunrise highlights, and prayer flags flowing across the foreground, this artwork captures the calm strength and spiritual stillness of the Himalayas.

The split-panel layout adds a modern aesthetic touch while maintaining the serene devotional mood of the mountain landscape. Perfect for desk setups, workspaces, meditation corners, or minimal interiors seeking depth and tranquility.

What You’ll Receive

• 1 Set = 3 Split Panels
• Matte, high-detail mountain print
• Soft atmospheric color grading
• Calm, premium aesthetic finish

Size & Finishing Note

We print on full sheets and manually trim white borders for a clean edge-to-edge finish.
Final dimensions may vary slightly (±0.5 inch) due to trimming.

Installation Note

Frames and wall tapes are not included.
You may add our wall-stick option at checkout for easy installation.

Perfect For

• Desk setups
• Meditation rooms
• Living room feature walls
• Mountain lovers
• Spiritual interiors
• Minimal workspaces
entry.s:tag: Guardian: The Lonely and Great God

entry.title: The Divine Vision | Krishna | Devotional | 3 Piece Set

Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 349.00 - 449.00 (3 variants)

Bring divine calm and spiritual presence into your space with this Krishna 3-Panel Split Wall Art, featuring a close-up of His sacred golden eyes and luminous tilak in a soft painterly devotional style.

Designed with a matte gouache-inspired finish and rich blue tones, this artwork creates a serene focal point above desks, workstations, bedrooms, or meditation corners. The split-panel layout adds a modern aesthetic touch while preserving the sacred emotion of the artwork.

The warm golden eyes, subtle blush tones, and soft lighting create a peaceful yet powerful presence that transforms any wall into a devotional sanctuary.

What You’ll Receive

• 1 Set = 3 Split Panels
• High-detail matte print finish
• Vibrant yet soft devotional color tones
• Modern minimal layout with spiritual depth

Size & Finishing Note

We print on full sheets and manually trim white borders for a clean edge-to-edge finish.
Final dimensions may vary slightly (±0.5 inch) due to trimming.

Installation Note

Frames and wall tapes are not included.
You may add our wall-stick option at checkout for easy installation.

Perfect For

• Desk setups
• Meditation corners
• Living room feature walls
• Devotional spaces
• Spiritual gifting
